forecasts.short: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
forecasts.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers before 9pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 38. North wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
forecasts.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers before midnight. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 39. West wind 2 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecasts.short: Scattered Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
forecasts.detailed: Scattered rain showers before 10pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 38. Northwest wind around 3 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

A chance of rain showers before 10pm, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 42. Northwest wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
